original_image_tags: Green paper document, hole-punched on left margin. Bottom right has a vertical handwritten number "0006748" in blue ink. Bottom left has several blue stamped markings: "HQ UFO", "17 MAR 1948", "ON-MAIL SHANNON", and a handwritten "ACC" or similar. A white label with "P 99846" is affixed near the bottom.
Handwritten annotations in blue ink at bottom right: "P&O recommended above answer by R&R [redacted] to D/I USAF".

elements.description: Typed document with a 'SECRET' stamp at the top and bottom, a date '17 MAR 1948', subject 'Flying Discs', and text referencing Colonel McCoy's proposal regarding fighter aircraft. Includes a blue stamp with 'HQ USAP 17 MAR 1948' and a signature block for George C. McDonald, Major General, USAF. A handwritten note is present at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the existence of a blue stamp with a date (17 MAR 1948) and a handwritten note at the bottom right, but they disagree on the exact text of the stamp and other visual elements like hole punches and labels.
